prompt: A surreal but realistic photograph of a lone person standing in a small clearing while surrounded by enormous dense crowds of people connected in tight groups around them, each crowd linking to many others while the central person has only a few connections, dramatic lighting, cinematic composition, visually uncanny social imbalance, no text, no symbols, no diagrams, no charts, no numbers, single frame
visual_logic: A central isolated person surrounded by densely interconnected crowds, making it visually clear that others appear far more socially connected than the observer.
